cards.headline: Ghana Names Its New Coach Today
cards.subline: The GFA Executive Council has met — the announcement is expected within hours.

cards.headline: No Cholera Outbreak After The Floods
cards.subline: GHS confirms zero cases — but warns risk stays high; mass fumigation is underway.

cards.headline: Eastern Corridor Gets Full Asphalt Rebuild
cards.subline: No more patches — engineers say the corridor has exceeded its design life.

cards.headline: Ghana For Gold: Stonebwoy Leads UK Shows
cards.subline: REPORTS — London July 17 and Edinburgh August 1, backing Team Ghana to Glasgow.

cards.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Collapses
cards.subline: Trump warns of a "1,000 missiles" response as Iran reports 14 dead from strikes.
